# freeswitch_dialplan_extension (Resource)

A FreeSWITCH dialplan extension (ordered conditions with actions).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_dialplan_extension" "internal" {
  name     = "internal-2xxx"
  domain   = freeswitch_domain.main.name
  context  = "company"
  priority = 10

  condition {
    field      = "destination_number"
    expression = "^(20[0-9][0-9])$"

    action {
      application = "bridge"
      data        = "user/$1@${freeswitch_domain.main.name}"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `context` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `condition` (Block List) Ordered match conditions. At least one is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--condition))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `priority` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `condition`

Required:

- `expression` (String)
- `field` (String)

Optional:

- `action` (Block List) Ordered actions for this condition. At least one is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--condition--action))

<a id="nestedblock--condition--action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `condition.action`

Required:

- `application` (String)

Optional:

- `data` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_dialplan_extension is imported by its UUID id
# (find it via: GET /api/v1/dialplan/extensions).
terraform import freeswitch_dialplan_extension.internal 7d0908a7-89e5-4a62-a0f7-7865cc9be8a2
```
